concerns.text: The task description states a hard abort if self-reported engagement is < 7 days, but spec.md explicitly allows statistical control as an alternative (FR-011). This is a constraint violation – the task narrows the allowed solution space beyond what the spec permits.

The task creates `configs/agency_weights.yaml`, while spec.md defines the path as `config/agency_weights.yaml`. This is a path mismatch that will cause runtime errors and violates the spec's defined configuration location.

Tasks T072 and T073 add 30-day and 90-day retention metrics, but spec.md FR-004 only authorizes five specific adherence metrics. This represents scope creep and a weakening of the defined requirements.

Tasks T075 and T078 add ethical review documentation and AI disclosure templates, but spec.md explicitly states ethical review is handled externally. This introduces unauthorized scope and violates the spec's defined boundaries.
The spec (FR-010) states confounders are *required*, while the tasks' descriptions imply they are optional. Clarify this discrepancy in the spec to avoid ambiguity.
Tasks T029 and T030 both address Benjamini-Hochberg FDR correction, creating redundancy. Consolidate this into a single task to avoid duplication.
Both T032 and T067 address provenance metadata generation. Clarify ownership and consolidate into a single task.
